channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Corner of Alice St & Decima St, 31st March
item.description:
Reported dumped black metal framed furniture, received an email to say that the issue was resolved, but it hasn’t been removed and is still in the same place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Decima Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage appears to look like fire/arson, 31st March
item.description:
Playground equipment vandalised. Playground currently closed. Vandalised equipment is boxed off but unable to use swings. Unfair that whole playground inaccessible for children. Lack of response to clear damaged equipment.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverside Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement 7-9 Shrubland Road, 31st March
item.description:
Sofa and gaming chair dumped on pavement on grounds outside block 1-9 Shrubland Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches blocking street lighting, 31st March
item.description:
There is a large tree root opposite No.11 Cameron Road and alongside No.1 Stone Road. The overhanging branches (see photo) block the public street light. Please can you resolve this problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Stone Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 11-13 Shrubland Road, 31st March
item.description:
Household goods and a tree stump dumped outside paladins 11-13 Shrubland Road. Has been there weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture next to wheelie bins, 31st March
item.description:
Furniture left next to wheelie bins
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New Inn Yard, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole of olinda road, 31st March
item.description:
I have complained yesterday and I have recieved an email stating "issue solved". Respectfully it has NOT so please find a solution as this is unsanitary and disgusting. What is the point of paying council tax when the streets look like this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Olinda Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 31st March
item.description:
Large pothole on junction at the top of Tufnell Park Rd by the traffic lights and near Brecknock Rd. It’s right in the path where pedestrians cross when the lights are red. Witnessed a man trip and stumble when running across the road. Could be very dangerous if someone fell and a car didn’t stop in time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 246-248, Tufnell Park Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and fly tipping, 31st March
item.description:
Disgusting amounts of litter and lots of fly tipping and abandoned furniture. This is a regular problem on this street- something needs to be done

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynmouth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping around communal bin, 31st March
item.description:
Huge amount of fly tipping including furniture and beds. Also a very, very strong smell of faeces - needs to be looked at urgently. Bin has also not been emptied and was reported a week ago but not addressed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Church Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped, 31st March
item.description:
Battery

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashenden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep hole, possibly sink hole in pavement large enough for an animal or foot to fall into., 31st March
item.description:
I noticed this at 17:30 today. I am concerned that someone may get seriously injured.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tulse Hill, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged pavement and trip hazard due to vehicles crossing kerb, 31st March
item.description:
Pavement is damaged and uneven where vehicles are regularly crossing the kerb. The surface is breaking up and creating a trip hazard for pedestrians, including children and vulnerable residents. This has been ongoing for some time and appears to be getting worse. There is no dropped kerb at this location.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whetstone Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattresses Dumped on Path, 31st March
item.description:
Two unwanted mattresses have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 31st March
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orchard Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic Rubbish Strewn on Turfed Area, 31st March
item.description:
Lots of domestic rubbish has been left strewn on the turfed area. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress and Other Items Dumped on Pat, 31st March
item.description:
A large unwanted mattress and other items have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 31st March
item.description:
A large amount of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmley Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 31st March
item.description:
An item of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Fridge-Freezer Dumped on Turfed Area, 31st March
item.description:
A large unwanted fridge-freezer along with an abandoned Blue-Top Bin and a pair of unwanted trainers (see second photo) have been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
